summary.verdict_desc: 本周计数 5 红 / 7 黄 / 12 绿（含本期新增『全口径债务/Capex 流量比』，信用类，估算约 50%、中度警戒，远低于互联网泡沫顶 80-100%）；指标总数由 23 扩至 24，red_pct 由 21.7% 微调至 20.8%（纯分母效应），加权风险分 35.4%。红灯数与上周持平，两个市场结构指标由黄转绿。水面之下出现明确的广度修复：S&P 500 50 日均线上方比例 6/12 回升至约 61.2%（5/29 仅 52.3%）站上 60% 绿区；等权重 RSP 年内首次反超市值加权 SPY（RSP +9.7-10.0% vs SPY +8.4-8.5%），6 月收益差转负，头部独涨格局明显松动。AI 板块从上周 Broadcom 因仅维持、拒绝上调 $56B AI 芯片指引而暴跌 14% 的回撤中企稳：6/12 SpaceX 以 $135 定价、首日收 $161（+19%）完成史上最大 IPO（募资 $75B、估值 $1.77T），三大指数同步走高。基本面继续兑现：Oracle 6/10 Q4 财报 RPO 飙至 $638B（+363% YoY、单季 +$85B），但逾 50% 来自 OpenAI、FY26 自由现金流 -$23.7B，需求强劲与客户集中、烧钱并存；CoreWeave 6/11 顺利发行 $1.25B + €2B 优先票据并加发 $3.5B，Neocloud 信用零事件；Fed 6/17 维持概率 97-99.5%、CPI 仍约 4.2%，higher-for-longer 延续。尽管整体风险边际缓和，基础判读本在观察期（red_pct<25%），但分类强制升级再次生效：估值 2/3 红（CAPE ≈40.5、Top-5 ≈27%）叠加资金面 3/4 红（Mag4 FCF 深度负值、VC AI 占比 ~80%、NVDA 客户投资/收入 ~43%）。估值 + 资金面双类共振触发分类强制升级。
summary.verdict_desc_en: This week prints 5 red / 7 yellow / 12 green (including a newly added 24th indicator, the All-in Debt/Capex flow ratio — Credit, estimated ~50%, moderate, far below the 80-100% dot-com peak); the indicator count expands from 23 to 24, nudging red_pct from 21.7% to 20.8% (a pure denominator effect) with the weighted risk score at 35.4%. The red count is unchanged and two market-structure gauges flipped from yellow to green. Beneath the surface, breadth is clearly repairing: the share of S&P 500 names above their 50-day average rebounded to ~61.2% on June 12 (just 52.3% on May 29), clearing the 60% green line; equal-weight RSP overtook cap-weighted SPY for the first time this year (RSP +9.7-10.0% vs SPY +8.4-8.5%), turning the 6-month spread negative as top-heavy leadership loosens markedly. The AI complex steadied after last week's drawdown — when Broadcom plunged 14% merely for reaffirming, rather than raising, its $56B AI-chip guide: on June 12 SpaceX priced at $135 and closed at $161 (+19%) to complete the largest IPO ever ($75B raised, $1.77T valuation), with the major indices rising alongside. Fundamentals keep delivering: Oracle's June 10 Q4 report showed RPO surging to $638B (+363% YoY, +$85B sequentially), though over 50% comes from OpenAI and FY26 free cash flow was -$23.7B — robust demand coexisting with customer concentration and cash burn; CoreWeave placed $1.25B + €2B of senior notes on June 11 and upsized by $3.5B, with zero neocloud credit events; the Fed carries 97-99.5% hold odds for June 17 with CPI still ~4.2% as higher-for-longer persists. Even with risk easing at the margin, the base framework reads Observation (red_pct < 25%), but the category override fires again: valuation 2/3 RED (CAPE ≈40.5, Top-5 ≈27%) plus capital 3/4 RED (Mag4 FCF deeply negative, VC AI share ~80%, NVDA customer-financing ~43%). Valuation + capital dual-category resonance triggers the forced upgrade.

wow_changes.note: S&P 500 50 日均线上方比例 6/12 回升至约 61.2%（5/29 为 52.3%），自 40-60% 黄区站上 60% 绿线；广度由头部独涨转向普涨，市场参与度明显改善，翻绿
wow_changes.note_en: The share of S&P 500 names above their 50-day average rebounded to ~61.2% on June 12 (52.3% on May 29), clearing the 60% green line from the 40-60% yellow band; breadth broadened from narrow mega-cap leadership toward broad participation — flips green

wow_changes.note: 等权重 RSP 年内首次反超市值加权 SPY（RSP +9.7-10.0% vs SPY +8.4-8.5%），6 月收益差转负至约 -1.5%，落入 <5% 绿区；头部独涨格局松动、涨势向广度扩散，翻绿
wow_changes.note_en: Equal-weight RSP overtook cap-weighted SPY for the first time this year (RSP +9.7-10.0% vs SPY +8.4-8.5%), pushing the 6-month spread negative to ~-1.5% into the sub-5% green zone; top-heavy leadership is loosening as gains broaden — flips green

wow_changes.to: 升温（SpaceX 6/12 首日 +19%、史上最大 IPO 完成）
wow_changes.note: SpaceX 6/12 以 $135 定价、首日收 $161（+19%）完成史上最大 IPO（募资 $75B、估值 $1.77T、纳斯达克 SPCX）；后续 Anthropic、OpenAI、Databricks 排队，但已挂牌/待发具体公司数仍 <10，未达洪流，维持黄灯
wow_changes.note_en: SpaceX completed the largest IPO ever on June 12, pricing at $135 and closing at $161 (+19%; $75B raised, $1.77T valuation, Nasdaq: SPCX); Anthropic, OpenAI and Databricks queue behind it, but the count of listed/imminent names is still under 10 — short of a Flood, stays yellow

wow_changes.note: Oracle 6/10 Q4 财报 RPO 飙至 $638B（+363% YoY、单季 +$85B），云收入 +47%、OCI +93%；但 BofA 指逾 50% RPO 来自 OpenAI、FY26 FCF -$23.7B，需求强劲与客户集中、负现金流并存，状态维持绿灯
wow_changes.note_en: Oracle's June 10 Q4 report showed RPO surging to $638B (+363% YoY, +$85B sequentially), with cloud revenue +47% and OCI +93%; but BofA flags that over 50% of RPO comes from OpenAI and FY26 free cash flow was -$23.7B — robust demand alongside concentration and negative cash flow, stays green

wow_changes.from: 惩罚加深（AI 板块单周回撤）
wow_changes.to: 选择性惩罚（不上调指引者受罚，板块企稳）
wow_changes.note: Broadcom 6/3 创纪录 AI 收入但仅维持 $56B 指引、未上调，6/4 暴跌 14% 拖累芯片股；本周板块企稳、SpaceX 首日 +19%、三大指数走高，惩罚转为对'不加码者'的选择性打击，未演变为系统性抛售，维持黄灯
wow_changes.note_en: Broadcom posted record AI revenue on June 3 but merely held its $56B guide without raising, plunging 14% on June 4 and dragging chip names; this week the sector steadied, SpaceX rose 19% on debut and the major indices climbed — punishment narrowed to a selective hit on those who 'fail to raise' rather than a systematic selloff, stays yellow

indicators.note: CAPE 约 40.5（multpl 41.43、GuruFocus 40.06），仍是 155 年来第 2 高、距 2000 年峰值 44.19 仅约 8%；高于长期均值约 24%，earnings yield 仅约 2.5%，即便广度修复，整体估值仍处极度拉伸区
indicators.note_en: CAPE sits near 40.5 (multpl 41.43, GuruFocus 40.06), still the 2nd-highest reading in 155 years and only ~8% below the 2000 peak of 44.19; about 24% above its long-run average with an earnings yield of just ~2.5% — even as breadth repairs, overall valuations remain extremely stretched

indicators.note: S&P 500 前 10 大权重约 37%、Top-5（NVDA / AAPL / MSFT / AMZN / GOOGL）合计 ≈27%；Magnificent Seven 早 6 月约 33.8%；本周广度修复令集中度略松，但仍贴近 2000 年极值，市值高度押注少数 AI 龙头
indicators.note_en: The S&P 500's top 10 weigh ~37% and the Top-5 (NVDA / AAPL / MSFT / AMZN / GOOGL) total ≈27%, with the Magnificent Seven at ~33.8% in early June; this week's breadth repair loosened concentration slightly, but it still hugs the 2000 extreme as index value bets heavily on a handful of AI leaders

indicators.note: NVDA 远期 PE 约 23x（GuruFocus 23.01、Yahoo 23.42、StockAnalysis 20.65，区间 21-23.5x），远低于 12 个月均值 43；FY28 EPS 持续上修使倍数维持历史低位，NVDA 自身估值并非泡沫源头，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: NVDA's forward PE is ~23x (GuruFocus 23.01, Yahoo 23.42, StockAnalysis 20.65; range 21-23.5x), far below its 12-month average of 43; ongoing FY28 EPS upgrades keep the multiple historically low — NVDA's own valuation is not the bubble's source, stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 指引下调=红 / 加速=黄 / 稳健=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Guidance cut = red / Accelerating = yellow / Steady = green
indicators.note: 四大 hyperscaler 2026 capex 合计约 $725B（AMZN $200B、MSFT $190B、GOOGL $180-190B、META $125-145B），YoY +77%，无一下调指引；MSFT 称约 $25B 为零部件涨价、内存短缺推升成本；继续加速、不可持续特征明显，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: The four hyperscalers guide ~$725B of 2026 capex (AMZN $200B, MSFT $190B, GOOGL $180-190B, META $125-145B), +77% YoY, with none cutting guidance; MSFT attributes ~$25B to component inflation amid a memory shortage — still accelerating with clear unsustainability hallmarks, stays yellow

indicators.note: Amazon 尾随 FCF 暴跌约 95% 至 $1.2B、2026 全年预计转负约 -$17B（capex $200B）；Mag4 合计 FCF 料降至 2014 年以来最低，唯 MSFT 仍正增长；Oracle FY26 FCF -$23.7B 进一步印证 capex 吞噬现金流，无季度新数据沿用 Q1 口径
indicators.note_en: Amazon's trailing FCF plunged ~95% to $1.2B and is projected to turn negative ~-$17B for full-year 2026 on $200B capex; combined Mag4 FCF is set to fall to its lowest since 2014, with only MSFT still growing — Oracle's FY26 FCF of -$23.7B further confirms capex devouring cash; no new quarterly print, carrying the Q1 read

indicators.name_zh: AI 占 VC 投资比重
indicators.note: Crunchbase/PitchBook Q1 2026：全球 VC 创纪录 $297-300B，AI 占 80-81%（$239-242B），较 2025 Q1 的 55% 大幅跃升；美元高度集中于 OpenAI/Anthropic/xAI 等少数巨额轮次，Anthropic 估值逼近 $1T，无季度新数据沿用 Q1 口径
indicators.note_en: Crunchbase/PitchBook Q1 2026: global VC hit a record $297-300B with AI taking 80-81% ($239-242B), up sharply from 55% in Q1 2025; dollars concentrate in a few mega-rounds for OpenAI/Anthropic/xAI, with Anthropic's valuation nearing $1T; no new quarterly print, carrying the Q1 read

indicators.note: NVDA 2026 前 4 个月已投 AI 股权 $40B+（含 OpenAI $30B 直投，由 $100B 意向缩减），累计承诺 $110B+ 再加 GPU 抵押债务；对 LTM 收入约 $253B 的比率约 43%，远超 Lucent 1999 峰值 24%；全行业循环融资规模估超 $800B，每笔投资捆绑采购协议，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: NVDA has committed $40B+ of AI equity in the first four months of 2026 (incl. a $30B direct OpenAI stake, trimmed from a $100B LOI), with cumulative commitments topping $110B plus GPU-backed debt; against ~$253B LTM revenue that is ~43%, far above Lucent's 1999 peak of 24%; industry-wide circular financing is estimated above $800B with every deal bundled to a purchase agreement, stays red

indicators.note: S5FI 6/12 收于约 61.2%（5/29 仅 52.3%），自黄区站上 60% 绿线；上周 AI/芯片回撤后广度不降反升，涨势由头部向中盘扩散，市场参与度明显改善，翻绿
indicators.note_en: S5FI closed near 61.2% on June 12 (just 52.3% on May 29), clearing the 60% green line from the yellow band; rather than weakening after last week's AI/chip pullback, breadth strengthened as gains broadened from mega-caps into mid-caps — participation improved markedly, flips green

indicators.name_zh: 市值加权 vs 等权重
indicators.note: 等权重 RSP 年内首次反超市值加权 SPY：RSP YTD +9.7-10.0% vs SPY +8.4-8.5%，6 月收益差转负至约 -1.5%，落入 <5% 绿区；头部独涨格局明显松动、涨势向广度扩散，翻绿
indicators.note_en: Equal-weight RSP overtook cap-weighted SPY for the first time this year: RSP +9.7-10.0% YTD vs SPY +8.4-8.5%, turning the 6-month spread negative to ~-1.5% into the sub-5% green zone; top-heavy leadership is loosening markedly as gains broaden out, flips green

indicators.name_zh: AI 龙头内部人卖买比
indicators.note: NVDA / PLTR / AVGO 内部人过去 12 个月累计卖出约 $4.6B、几乎零买入；个人层面仍以卖出为主、卖买比偏高但未及 2000 年 23x 极值；OpenInsider 聚合页（egress 受限）暂不可用，沿用上周值
indicators.note_en: NVDA / PLTR / AVGO insiders sold ~$4.6B over the trailing 12 months with virtually zero purchases; individual-level flows stay sell-heavy and the ratio is elevated but below the 2000 extreme of 23x; the OpenInsider aggregation page is unavailable (egress-blocked), carrying last week's value

indicators.threshold_text: 洪流=红 / 升温=黄 / 平静=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Flood = red / Warming = yellow / Quiet = green
indicators.note: SpaceX 6/12 以 $135 定价、首日收 $161（+19%）完成史上最大 IPO（募资 $75B、估值 $1.77T、纳斯达克 SPCX）；Anthropic、OpenAI、Databricks、Cerebras 仍在排队，合计需求超 2025 全年美股 IPO 市场数倍，但已挂牌/待发具体公司数仍 <10，未达洪流，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: SpaceX completed the largest IPO ever on June 12, pricing at $135 and closing at $161 (+19%; $75B raised, $1.77T valuation, Nasdaq: SPCX); Anthropic, OpenAI, Databricks and Cerebras still queue with combined demand several times the entire 2025 US IPO market, but the count of listed/imminent names is still under 10 — short of a Flood, stays yellow

indicators.note: ICE BofA HY OAS 最新约 2.75%（275 bps），远低于长期均值 3.94%、中位数 4.52%；尽管 AI 基建烧钱、$725B capex 持续，信用市场对 AI 风险仍未现压力，是当前最支撑多头的指标
indicators.note_en: ICE BofA HY OAS is near 2.75% (275 bps), far below the 3.94% long-run average and 4.52% median; despite the AI infrastructure cash burn and ongoing $725B capex, credit markets still show no stress on AI risk — the most bull-supportive indicator right now

indicators.name_zh: 数据中心 ABS 利差
indicators.threshold_text: 走阔 50bps+ = 红 / 稳定 = 黄 / 收窄 = 绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widening 50bps+ = red / Stable = yellow / Tightening = green
indicators.note: 顶级数据中心债利差近数周再收窄约 60bps（发行放缓、市场情绪改善）；CoreWeave 6/11 顺利发行 $1.25B + €2B 优先票据并加发 $3.5B，数据中心融资条件持续宽松，信用市场对 AI 基建仍未现压力，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Spreads on top-rated data center bonds tightened a further ~60bps in recent weeks as issuance slowed and sentiment improved; CoreWeave placed $1.25B + €2B of senior notes on June 11 and upsized by $3.5B — financing conditions for data centers stay easy with no credit stress on AI infrastructure, stays green

indicators.note: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda 90 日内无评级下调或违约；CoreWeave 6/11 顺利发行 $1.25B + €2B 优先票据并加发 $3.5B，再融资渠道畅通；其总债务高企、客户与到期集中仍是潜在风险点，但短期信用零事件，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda — no downgrades or defaults in 90 days; CoreWeave smoothly placed $1.25B + €2B of senior notes on June 11 and upsized by $3.5B, keeping refinancing channels open; its high total debt and concentrated maturities remain a latent risk, but with zero near-term credit events it stays green

indicators.name_zh: 全口径债务/Capex 流量比
indicators.note: 流量口径：2026E 新增全口径债务 ÷ 2026E 全年 Capex，估算约 45-55%。分子含 CSP 表内+表外杠杆（租赁/SPV/数据中心 ABS）及 neoclouds（CoreWeave/Crusoe/Lambda/Nebius 等）下游全部债务。当前杠杆已显著抬升，但仍远低于互联网/电信基建泡沫顶点的 80-100%——这轮买单更多由自由现金流与股权承担，债务依赖度处中段，列为中度警戒。
indicators.note_en: Flow basis: 2026E incremental all-in debt ÷ 2026E full-year capex, estimated ~45-55%. The numerator spans CSP on- and off-balance-sheet leverage (leases / SPVs / data-center ABS) plus all downstream neocloud debt (CoreWeave / Crusoe / Lambda / Nebius, etc.). Leverage has risen materially but remains far below the 80-100% peak of the dot-com / telecom build-outs — this cycle is funded more by free cash flow and equity, putting debt reliance mid-range, scored moderate.
indicators.source_name: 综合估算（研报/财报/债券发行）

indicators.name_zh: AI 行业 Token 月度环比
indicators.threshold_text: 收缩=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Contraction = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: OpenRouter 月 token 量稳在约 100 万亿（周 25 万亿、半年 5 倍），全年有望突破千万亿（quadrillion）、单日已超 1 万亿；服务超 800 万用户、接入 400+ 模型，全产业用量继续加速，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: OpenRouter holds at ~100T tokens/month (25T weekly, 5x in six months) and is on pace to top a quadrillion this year, already processing 1T+ per day; serving 8M+ users across 400+ models, industry-wide usage keeps accelerating, stays green

indicators.name_zh: Token 增速 / 收入增速 比值
indicators.note: Anthropic ARR 由 4 月 $30B 升至 5 月约 $45B（环比 +50%），收入增速持续快于 token 量增速（半年 5 倍、月环比约 +35%）；单 token 价值上行、付费需求真实，比值维持 <1x，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Anthropic's ARR rose from $30B in April to ~$45B in May (+50% MoM), with revenue growth still outpacing token-volume growth (5x in six months, ~+35% MoM); per-token value keeps rising on genuine paid demand, holding the ratio below 1x, stays green

indicators.name_zh: AI 收入增速的二阶导
indicators.threshold_text: 减速=红 / 平稳=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Decel = red / Flat = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Anthropic run-rate 由 2 月 $14B → 3 月 $19B → 4 月 $30B → 5 月约 $45B，月增量持续放大（+5/+11/+15B），Q2 单季收入料约 $10.9B；约 36% 领先 OpenAI ~$33B，二阶导维持正向，唯 OpenAI 对其毛收入口径仍有约 $8B 争议
indicators.note_en: Anthropic's run-rate climbed Feb $14B → Mar $19B → Apr $30B → May ~$45B, with the monthly increment still expanding (+5/+11/+15B) and Q2 revenue tracking ~$10.9B; ~36% ahead of OpenAI's ~$33B, the 2nd derivative stays positive, though OpenAI still disputes ~$8B of its gross-revenue accounting

indicators.note: McKinsey Q1 2026：72% 企业至少 1 项 AI workload 生产化（2024 55%、2020 20%）；Deloitte：67% 企业月耗 token 超 10 亿、25% 已将 ≥40% 实验转产；深度集成仍在爬坡但整体高位，无季度新数据沿用
indicators.note_en: McKinsey Q1 2026: 72% of enterprises run at least one AI workload in production (vs 55% in 2024, 20% in 2020); Deloitte: 67% now use 1B+ tokens monthly and 25% have moved 40%+ of experiments to production — deep integration still climbing but the headline stays high; no new quarterly survey, carried over

indicators.threshold_text: 负增长=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Negative = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Oracle 6/10 Q4 财报 RPO 飙至 $638B（+363% YoY、单季 +$85B），云收入 +47%、OCI +93%；MSFT 商业 RPO ~$392B、GCP 积压 $460B，合计积压超 $1.4T，递延需求持续强劲；但 Oracle 逾 50% RPO 来自 OpenAI、FY26 FCF -$23.7B，强需求与客户集中并存，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Oracle's June 10 Q4 report showed RPO surging to $638B (+363% YoY, +$85B sequentially) with cloud revenue +47% and OCI +93%; MSFT commercial RPO ~$392B and GCP backlog $460B bring the combined pipeline above $1.4T as deferred demand stays robust; but over 50% of Oracle's RPO is from OpenAI and FY26 FCF was -$23.7B — strong demand alongside concentration, stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 任何=红 / 调查=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any confirmed = red / Investigation = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 无主要 AI 龙头正式执法；iLearning Engines round-tripping 案 4 月被刑事起诉（虚增 $144M，已破产）属小盘股；Burry 仍指控 Mag7 借延长服务器折旧虚增 2026-28 利润、Super Micro 受 SEC 调查，均非核心 AI 龙头，本周无新增执法，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: No formal enforcement against a major AI leader; the iLearning Engines round-tripping case was criminally charged in April ($144M inflated, already bankrupt) but is a microcap; Burry keeps alleging Mag7 inflates 2026-28 profits via extended server depreciation and Super Micro remains under SEC scrutiny, but none are core AI bellwethers — no new enforcement this week, stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 加息=红 / 通胀压力=黄 / 降息=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Hike = red / Inflation pressure = yellow / Cut = green
indicators.note: 6/17 FOMC，CME 维持概率 97-99.5%、加息概率极低；利率维持 3.5-3.75%，CPI 仍约 4.2% 远超 2% 目标、劳动力稳健，higher-for-longer 延续，对极度拉伸的估值构成持续压制，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: The June 17 FOMC carries 97-99.5% hold odds with negligible hike probability; rates stay at 3.5-3.75% while CPI runs ~4.2%, far above the 2% target, and the labor market holds firm — higher-for-longer persists, a continued headwind for extremely stretched valuations, stays yellow

indicators.name_zh: 资本开支指引市场反应
indicators.threshold_text: 系统性惩罚=红 / 偶发=黄 / 奖励=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Systematic punishment = red / Episodic = yellow / Rewarded = green
indicators.note: Broadcom 6/3 创纪录 AI 收入但仅维持 $56B 指引、未上调，6/4 暴跌 14% 拖累芯片股；本周板块企稳、SpaceX 首日 +19%、三大指数走高，惩罚转为对'不加码者'的选择性打击而非全面抛售；市场仍要求高 capex 配兑现，但未系统性惩罚，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: Broadcom posted record AI revenue on June 3 but merely held its $56B guide without raising, plunging 14% on June 4 and dragging chip names; this week the sector steadied, SpaceX rose 19% on debut and the indices climbed — punishment narrowed to a selective hit on those who 'fail to raise' rather than a broad selloff; the market still demands capex be matched by delivery but is not punishing systematically, stays yellow

indicators.threshold_text: 普遍承认过热=红 / 部分=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widespread acknowledgment = red / Partial = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 对冲表态持续升温：Altman 直言估值'非理性、insane'、'必有人巨亏'；Pichai 承认'非理性'、'无公司能免疫包括谷歌'；Dimon 称'不少资产已进入泡沫区间、部分钱会亏'；频率与强度偏高，但 CEO 仍坚持 capex 终将回本、未集体收手，未达全体一致承认过热，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: Hedging keeps intensifying: Altman calls valuations 'irrational, insane' and warns 'someone will lose a phenomenal amount'; Pichai concedes 'irrationality' and that 'no company is immune, including us'; Dimon says 'a lot of assets are entering bubble territory and some money will be lost'; frequency and intensity stay elevated, yet CEOs still defend capex as eventually paying off without pulling back — short of a universal 'overheated' consensus, stays yellow
